title: Spicy Sesame Korean Plum Tomato Stir-fry
description: A light and sour weeknight dish featuring plum tomatoes, tofu, sesame seeds, and spicy kick in a quick stir-fry that's perfect for vegetarians.

ingredients.name: 1 block firm tofu, pressed and cut into cubes
1/4 cup soy sauce (low sodium if available)
2 tbsp rice vinegar or apple cider vinegar
Dash of nutritional yeast for extra umami (optional)

instructions: Heat a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat. Add sesame oil and garlic, sautéing until fragrant.
Add pressed tofu cubes to the pan, cooking until golden brown on all sides.
Add diced plum tomatoes, bell peppers, and red pepper flakes. Cook for about 2-3 minutes, allowing flavors to meld together.
Pour in soy sauce and rice vinegar. Stir well to combine all ingredients.
Sprinkle toasted sesame seeds over the top of the stir-fry and mix thoroughly.
Serve hot with steamed rice or noodles.
